final:
module top_module(
    input in,
    input clock,
	 input reset,
    output reg out
    );reg obf_prev_in;
	 
	 always @(posedge clock) begin
		if (reset) begin
			obf_prev_in <= 0;
		end
		else begin
			if ((obf_prev_in == 0) && (in == 1)) begin
				out <= 1;
			end
			else begin
				out <= 0;
			end
			obf_prev_in <= in;
		end
	 end

endmodule
